title: Dyeable Items
body:
![Crafting Table interface, with a Bundle being dyed to blue while other colored items and displayed in the player's inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qU2h2fbP/images/2559c26fcff65395a43bec8d581597630a4ef7d9.png)

This pack allows you to dye Book and Quills and Bundles!

Do you want to organize items in different color-coded bundles? Or change the cover of a book to better fit the message you're writing?
Simply place your desired item in the Crafting Table alongside your desired dye, and there you go! A newly-colored item for you to enjoy!
And don't worry about signing your colored book, it will still keep its color afterwards!

## IMPORTANT:
Coloring an item will **COMPLETELY RESET ITS DATA**. This means not only will you lose anything you've previously written in a book, but you'll also **LOSE ANYTHING YOU'VE PUT INSIDE THE BUNDLE**, so please make sure to empty it out completely before dyeing it.

Dyeable Items takes no responsibility over items lost inside bundles during the coloring process.
